LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.description: An old, rusted fragment of an ARC. It was probably abandoned when the construction project was halted. It might be possible to disassemble it to obtain some valuable ARC components.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.label: ancient ARC part
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_One.description: A rusted frame of an old power generator, incomplete and barely holding together. Most of its parts are long gone, scavenged or destroyed by time. What’s left is little more than scrap, with no hope of restoration. Perhaps investigating the area could allow you to find the location of another prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_One.label: prototype
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Three.descriptio: An almost-complete generator, abandoned before it could ever work. The structure is more solid, but its insides are wrecked—rust, missing pieces, and heavy overgrowth make it useless. Only a few materials can still be salvaged, but among them it is possible to find some ARC components. Perhaps investigating the area could allow you to find the location of another prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Three.label: prototype
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Two.description: An abandoned generator. Its machinery slightly more intact but still useless. Broken panels, snapped wires, and heavy rust show it was never finished. It’s overgrown and forgotten, offering only a few parts to salvage. Perhaps investigating the area could allow you to find the location of another prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Two.label: prototype
LanguageData.VQE_AncientChainlinkFence.description: An ancient fence made of reinforced metal posts connected by rusted chainlink.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientChainlinkFence.label: ancient chainlink fence
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionCrane.description: A rusted, overgrown wreck of a large construction crane. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Cranes like that could have been used to construct the large ARC generators, but this wreck can no longer be utilised for anything due to broken down machinery.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionCrane.label: ancient construction crane
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionTruck.description: A rusted, overgrown wreck of a large construction truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. It was most likely used in construction of an ARC generator, judging by the still present shells of a large generator unit strapped on the back.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionTruck.label: ancient construction truck
LanguageData.VQE_AncientDigger.description: A rusted, overgrown wreck of a large digger. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. A digger of that size could’ve been used to prepare the area for the construction of an ARC generator, but this one is in a very bad state.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientDigger.label: ancient digger
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGenetron.description: An ancient prototype of an ARC, ruined by time and lack of maintenance. Most of the critical machinery has been looted long ago, thwarting any restatoration attempts, however deconstructing it may still yield valuable components, useful in constructing a brand new ARC. This ancient ruin can be studied to learn how to construct and maintain an ARC.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGenetron.label: ancient ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGeothermalGenetron.descriptio: An ancient geothermal ARC, ruined by time and lack of maintenance. Most of the critical machinery has been looted long ago, thwarting any restatoration attempts, however deconstructing it may still yield valuable components, useful in constructing a brand new ARC. This ancient ruin can be studied to learn how to construct a geothermal ARC.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGeothermalGenetron.label: ancient geothermal ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientOvergrownGenetron.description: A mysterious, ancient, overgrown ARC. It seems to look more like a working prototype than a finished product, now fully covered in brambles and signs of aging. Somehow, despite its age, it’s still operating, generating sufficient power for nearby electrical networks. Any tampering with it is bound to irreversibly damage it, but it may be possible to extract some ARC components from it.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientOvergrownGenetron.label: experimental ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles.description: An ancient, rusted filing cabinet containing folders with research notes regarding the construction of an ARC generator.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles.label: ancient research files
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles_Off.description: An ancient, rusted filing cabinet. It’s completely empty.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles_Off.label: ancient filing cabinet
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal.description: An ancient computer terminal. It can be used to access research notes related to an ARC generator unit.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal.label: research terminal
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Cracked.desc: An ancient computer terminal. The screen is cracked and any components of value have been removed.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Off.descript: An ancient computer terminal. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Off.label: ancient research terminal
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Boxes.description: A rusted construction pallet with a stack of old, rusted steel boxes. Anything of value has been removed a long time ago.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Boxes.label: construction pallet with boxes
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Chemfuel.descript: A rusted construction pallet with a stack of unused chemfuel jerrycans. Can be salvaged through to recover some chemfuel.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Chemfuel.label: construction pallet with jerrycans
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Components.descri: A rusted construction pallet with a large container of scrapped components on it. Can be rummaged through to recover some industrial components.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Components.label: construction pallet with components
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Scrap.description: A rusted construction pallet with a large container of scrap on it. Can be rummaged through to recover some steel.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Scrap.label: construction pallet with scrap
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Wood.description: A rusted construction pallet with a large stack of rotting wood. It is possible to recover some drier wood from it.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Wood.label: construction pallet with wood
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyConstructionPallet.description: A rusted construction pallet. It’s empty.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyConstructionPallet.label: empty construction pallet
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart.description: A bizarre piece of machinery that was designed for a large generator. Since it was covered with a tarp, it’s relatively intact. It can be studied to gain some knowledge about the ARC generator unit that may help decipher the ancient research data left by the inventor. It might be possible to disassemble it to obtain some valuable ARC components.
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart.label: experimental ARC part
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart_Studied.descript: A bizarre piece of machinery that was designed for a large generator. As you have already studied it, it can be disassembled for parts.
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart_Studied.label: studied experimental ARC part
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.description: A twisted chunk of an ARC. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.label: ARC junk
LanguageData.VQE_NuclearGenetronHusk.description: A ruined husk of a nuclear ARC. Lack of maintenance or other unforeseen crisis has resulted in a devastating detonation that has twisted the metal into something quite unusable. This husk can be studied to learn how to construct and maintain a nuclear ARC, but can also be deconstructed to yield some resources back.
LanguageData.VQE_NuclearGenetronHusk.label: nuclear ARC husk
LanguageData.VQE_OvergrownCryptosleepCasket.descripti: This cryptosleep casket is overgrown with brambles and looks like it has been here for a very long time. Who knows what it might contain?
LanguageData.VQE_OvergrownCryptosleepCasket.label: cryptosleep casket
